goal: subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n) = forall(x0: G) { n.contains(x0) implies phi(x0) = H.1 }

p.c: function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1(x2) = T2.1 } = subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[T0, T2](x1, x0) }[G, H](n, phi)
subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n) and a ∈ n
(forall(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ n or H.1 = phi(x0) } = true)
(forall(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ n and H.1 != phi(x0)) })
function(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ n and H.1 != phi(x0)) }(a)
not a ∈ n or H.1 = phi(a)
not subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n) or not a ∈ n or H.1 = phi(a)
subgroup_maps_to_one_raw[G, H](phi, n) and a ∈ n
